chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.D- 70 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 760/2-023 2.For orders on MA 761/2023 3.For orders on MA 762/2023 4.For hearing of Bail Application 23-08-2023 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate along with applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicant Javed Ahmed Sial seeks protective bail in Crime No.101 of 2022, registered at Police Station, Dars-Naushahro Feroze, for offence under Sections 341, 147, 148, 427 PPC read with Section 7 ATA, 1997. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case by the police; that the applicant is ready to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of police as NBWs have been issued against him by the trial Court. Hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of Seven days is granted to the applicant subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Thirty Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. Meanwhile, operation of NBWs shall remain suspended for the above period of seven days. It is made clear that if the applicant failed to surrender before the trial Court in seven days, his bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms.

It is made clear that if the applicant failed to surrender before the trial Court in seven days, his bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
